title: Endoscope Geometric Distortion- A Method for Quantitative Evaluation
author: Regulatory Catalog
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: This tool is a method to evaluate endoscope geometric distortion. Current methods to evaluate endoscope geometric distortion are either too difficult to understand or too simple to accurately describe complex geometric distortion. The method overcomes these limitations, has clear physical meaning, and can facilitate lesion size estimation during diagnosis.
